data.name: My Cute Pagangirl
data.detailed_description:
♥ 引人入胜的故事♥

⨁我可爱的 ⨁PAGANGIRL⨁ 是一部具有三消游戏玩法的讽刺视觉小说。 在 Magna Germania 与可爱的异教动漫女孩一起度过一个令人兴奋的暑假！
更深入地了解居住在这些土地上的古代日耳曼和斯拉夫部落的生活。 与您曾曾曾曾曾的……祖母一起踏上激动人心的旅程！ 你能与一个 母权制统治的古老异教部落合并吗 ? ♥

♥ 可爱的女孩们♥

“芭芭雅嘎” 是一位迷人的年轻女子，但有着可怕的怪癖。 她住在森林里，准备某种药剂。 人们经常在她的小屋附近消失，但这些都只是谣言♥

⚴阿莲娜⚴——一个等待入会仪式的迷人少女。 她还很年轻，缺乏经验，但非常勇敢，准备不惜一切代价实现她的目标。 她需要只有你才能给她的爱和关怀♥

♥ 特征♥:

  • Magna Germania 周边的爱情故事！
  • 有异教风味的可爱女孩们
  • 母系氏族制的异教部落
  • 三消游戏的经典小说
  • G374 的出色洛菲嘻哈


这个游戏不包含不宽容，任何政治组织的任何宗教等等。 只有爱和相互理解。 让Match3，而不是战争♥

data.short_description: 我可爱的 ⨁PAGANGIRL⨁ 是一款具有三消游戏玩法的讽刺视觉小说。 在 Magna Germania 与可爱的异教动漫女孩一起度过一个令人兴奋的暑假！ 踏上充满秘密和神秘主义的危险旅程！
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 烏克蘭文, 繁體中文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz or faster
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0+ Compatible Card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2,28 Ghz or faste
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0+ Compatible Card
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: My Cute Pagangirl
data.detailed_description:
♥FASCINATING STORY♥

⨁My Cute PAGANGIRL⨁ – a satirical visual novel with “Match3” gameplay. Spend your summer vacation with cute pagan anime girls in Magna Germania!
Get to know the way of life of the ancient Germanic and Slavic tribes inhabiting these lands. Set off into a captivating journey with your great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great-great…grandmom! Will you be able to meld into the ancient pagan tribe ruled by the matriarchy?♥

♥CUTE GIRLS♥

⚴Baba Yaga ⚴– a beautiful young woman, but with her own spooky oddities. She lives in the forest and always cooks some strange decoctions. They say that people tend to disappear near her hut, but that’s just hearsay! ♥

⚴Alyonka⚴ – a young charming lady waiting for her initiation rite. She is still young and amateur but she is very brave and ready for anything to achieve her goals. She needs care that only you are able to provide. ♥

♥Features♥:

  • Love story in the setting of Magna Germania!
  • Cute anime girls with a pagan twist
  • Matriarchy pagan tribe
  • Classical visual novel with Match3 gameplay
  • Amazing Lofi hip hop by G374


This game does not contain non-tolerance, any religious of any political organizations and anything like that. Only love and mutual understanding. Make Match3, not war ♥

data.short_description: ⨁My Cute PAGANGIRL⨁ – a satirical visual novel with “Match3” gameplay. Spend your summer vacation with cute pagan anime girls in Magna Germania! Set off into a dangerous journey full of secrets and mysteries!
data.supported_languages:
English*, Russian, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian, Traditional Chinese, Japanese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz or faster
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0+ Compatible Card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: 2,28 Ghz or faste
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0+ Compatible Card
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
